title: dioscorea sumiderensis
intro: Dioscorea sumiderensis, also known as Sumidera yam, is a rare species of yam native to the mountains of Oaxaca, Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dioscorea sumiderensis include reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting cardiovascular health. It is commonly prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and capsules for its medicinal and health benefits.
